_comment: Cross-language test vector pinning the fleet-control signed control-request contract: a TS signer (crypto.subtle Ed25519, src/fleet/control-request.ts) must produce bytes the host Python verifier (mumega.com agents/fleet-control/control_request.py) accepts, and vice-versa. Generated once by node WebCrypto; the throwaway PRIVATE key is intentionally NOT committed. The SAME file lives in the mumega.com repo (agents/fleet-control/testdata/) so both sides test the identical vector. If either side changes canonicalization, one of the two tests fails.
